copied_from.display_value: Scheduled script send email notification past End Date

sys_atf_test.description: Tests that the script send an email notification to the request loaner about their overdue loan. Two things are validated in this test. First, that the script trigger the event registration "loaner.overdue". And second, that the notification listening to that event actually send the email.
sys_atf_test.name: Scheduled script send email notification past End Date copy
sys_atf_test.sys_name: Scheduled script send email notification past End Date copy

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_test_8480410e83204f105587fa96feaad3b5

Two things are validated in this test. First, that the script trigger the event registration "loaner.overdue". And second, that the notification listening to that event actually send the email.</description><enable_parameterized_testing>false</enable_parameterized_testing><fail_on_server_error>true</fail_on_server_error><name>Scheduled script send email notification past End Date copy</name><parameters/><remember/><sn_atf_tg_generated>false</sn_atf_tg_generated><sys_class_name>sys_atf_test</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8480410e83204f105587fa96feaad3b5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Scheduled script send email notification past End Date copy</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Loaner Device Manager" source="x_1883746_loaner_0">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Loaner Device Manager">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_test_8480410e83204f105587fa96feaad3b5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_updated_on><test_origin>manual</test_origin></sys_atf_test><sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=8480410e83204f105587fa96feaad3b5"/></record_update>
